PROP-baseauction-inv-002.text: Asset transferred to bidder BEFORE pulling assetOut creates callback window; callback must not alter auction state.
PROP-baseauction-inv-002.assertion: forall bid(asset, amt, data): state(auction) unchanged between safeTransfer(out) and safeTransferFrom(in)

locations.note: safeTransfer(asset out) occurs before auctionCallback and safeTransferFrom(assetOut in) — window between the two transfers
